SEARCH
Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.api.punishment

Interface TemporalPunishment

All Superinterfaces:
Punishment, ReasonHolder
All Known Subinterfaces:
Ban, Mute
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractTemporalPunishment, NecrifyBan, NecrifyMute
public interface TemporalPunishment extends Punishment
An interface containing some methods to only punish a player for a defined duration.
See Also:
  • Ban
  • Mute
Implementation Requirements
Instances of this interface must expire sometime in the future. This means that you may use non-permanent punishment durations for this type of punishment; but you may also use permanent ones as long as they expire sometime, which may be the year 10,000 or so. If your punishment does not expire or has no infinite duration, use Punishment instead.

  • Method Details

    • getDuration

      @NotNull @NotNull PunishmentDuration getDuration()
      Returns the duration of this punishment. This only provides information about when the punishment will end, not its creation time.
      Returns:
      the duration of the underlying punishment

    • isPermanent

      boolean isPermanent()
      Whether or not this punishment is permanent. This is equivalent to getDuration().isPermanent().
      Returns:
      true if the punishment is permanent, otherwise false
      See Also:
      • PunishmentDuration.isPermanent()

    • change

      @NotNull @NotNull CompletableFuture<Punishment> change(@NotNull @NotNull PunishmentDuration newDuration, @Nullable @Nullable LocalDateTime creationTime, @Nullable @Nullable net.kyori.adventure.text.Component newReason) throws PunishmentException
      Changes the duration and reason of this punishment. This method can be used if a player created an appeal an it was accepted.
      Parameters:
      newDuration - the new duration of the punishment (relative to the point of punishment issuance)
      creationTime - the new creation time of the punishment, or null if it should remain the same
      newReason - the new reason which should be displayed to the player, or null if it should remain the same
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the new punishment
      Throws:
      PunishmentException
      See Also:
      • Punishment.cancel()
      • change(Component)

    • change

      default CompletableFuture<Punishment> change(@Nullable @Nullable net.kyori.adventure.text.Component newReason)
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Changes the duration and reason of this punishment. This method can be used if a player created an appeal an it was accepted.
      Specified by:
      change in interface Punishment
      Parameters:
      newReason - the new reason which should be displayed to the player or null if the reason should not be changed
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the new punishment
      See Also:
      • Punishment.cancel()

    • totalDuration

      @NotNull @NotNull PunishmentDuration totalDuration()
      Returns the total duration of this punishment from Punishment.getCreationTime() until the expiration date.
      Returns:
      the total duration of this punishment
      Since:
      1.2.0
